title: Non-capturing groups without a quantifier should not be used
description: Avoid using non-capturing groups without a quantifier, as they are less efficient and may lead to unexpected results.
message: Avoid using non-capturing groups without a quantifier
recommendation: Use non-capturing groups with a quantifier whenever possible
why_is_this_an_issue: Non-capturing groups without a quantifier are less efficient and may lead to unexpected results.
how_to_fix: Use non-capturing groups with a quantifier whenever possible

logic.new_check_type_doc: This custom check type pattern matches non-capturing groups without a quantifier

function_code:
def check_noncapturing_group(node):
    return '^(?=.*(?<=\()\!(?:\k<0>|\\b))\w+\b(?=.*\))$'.match(node.regex) is not None

metadata.title: Non-capturing groups without a quantifier should not be used
